name: 10ct LED Non-Drop Indoor Outdoor Café String Lights Clear Bulbs with Black Wire - Threshold™: UL Listed, Electric Patio Lighting
description:
Elevate your atmosphere with the inviting glow of these 10-Count LED Non-Drop Indoor Outdoor Cafe String Lights from Threshold™. Featuring a black plastic cord strung with ten LED non-drop bulbs, these clear string lights will brighten up the inside or outside of your house with a joyful look. Drape them in your living or dining room or hang them along the edges of your patio or deck to create a warm and welcoming ambiance.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
